title: HEST-006 A Beautiful Girl Who Lives Alone (18) Hana Shiraishi Uses Assistance From Her Teachers For Living Expenses - Wakasakura Riku
overview: Teachers who took care of me ... Forbidden affair aid with former ○ school teachers. Help with rent and branded goods for students who dropped out. A little girl who generously sells her body to save living expenses. Make a cute face and be spoiled by adults, let them see the other side of the face. An obscene 18-year-old beautiful girl who lives an obscene sex life asks her teacher for help with her innocent body and magical smile.
